title: Creator's Gift grants dice and bonuses while equipped

card.rawText: This card cannot be negated when played. Atk: +6. Hit: +6. Atk Dice Rolls: +2. Hit Dice Rolls: +2.

effect.value: ATK_BONUS ADD 6; HIT_BONUS ADD 6; ATK_DICE_ROLLS ADD 2; HIT_DICE_ROLLS ADD 2

plan.title: Creator's Gift grants dice and bonuses while equipped
plan.summary: Attach Creator's Gift and verify the while-equipped stat modifier route is represented for the equipped creature.

notes: Pre-place this equip Magic on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
Use the card rules text for expected stat changes.

steps: Put Creator's Gift in player_1 magic slot.
Attach it to player_1 primary creature.
Verify the while-equipped effect is represented by runtime state/events.

expectedAssertions.label: Creator's Gift stays in player_1 magic slots

manualVerification: Verify against card text: This card cannot be negated when played. Atk: +6. Hit: +6. Atk Dice Rolls: +2. Hit Dice Rolls: +2.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_005_creator_s_gift-005-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
